| onHighlightedAxisChange   | `((axisItems: AxisItemIdentifier[]) => void)`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | -                     | The function called when the pointer position corresponds to a new axis data item.&#xA;This update can either be caused by a pointer movement, or an axis update.&#xA;In case of multiple axes, the function is called if at least one axis is updated.&#xA;The argument contains the identifier for all axes with a `data` property. |
| onItemClick               | `onItemClick`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | -                     | Callback fired when a bar item is clicked.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| onTooltipAxisChange       | `((axisItems: AxisItemIdentifier[]) => void)`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | -                     | The function called when the pointer position corresponds to a new axis data item.&#xA;This update can either be caused by a pointer movement, or an axis update.&#xA;In case of multiple axes, the function is called if at least one axis is updated.&#xA;The argument contains the identifier for all axes with a `data` property. |
| onTooltipItemChange       | `((tooltipItem: BarItemIdentifier \| null) => void)`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | -                     | The callback fired when the tooltip item changes.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| onZoomChange              | `((zoomData: ZoomData[]) => void)`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -                     | Callback fired when the zoom has changed.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| plugins                   | `[ChartPlugin<UseChartZAxisSignature>, ChartPlugin<UseChartBrushSignature>, ChartPlugin<UseChartTooltipSignature<'bar'>>, ChartPlugin<UseChartInteractionSignature>, ChartPlugin<UseChartCartesianAxisSignature<'bar'>>, ChartPlugin<UseChartHighlightSignature<'bar'>>, ChartPlugin<UseChartVisibilityManagerSignature<'bar'>>, ChartPlugin<UseChartKeyboardNavigationSignature>, ChartPlugin<UseChartProZoomSignature>, ChartPlugin<UseChartProExportSignature>]`                                                                                                                                           | -                     | Array of plugins used to add features to the chart.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| renderer                  | `RendererType`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | `'svg-single'`        | The type of renderer to use for the bar plot. `svg-single`: Renders every bar in a `<rect />` element.`svg-batch`: Batch renders bars in `<path />` elements for better performance with large datasets, at the cost of some limitations.&#xA;Read more: https\://mui.com/x/react-charts/bars/#performance                            |
| series\*                  | `BarSeries[]`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | -                     | The series to display in the bar chart.&#xA;An array of \[\[BarSeries]] objects.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| seriesConfig              | `{ bar: ChartSeriesTypeConfig<'bar'> }`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | -                     | The configuration for the series types.&#xA;This is used to define how each series type should be processed, colored, and displayed.                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| showToolbar               | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | `false`               | If true, shows the default chart toolbar.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| skipAnimation             | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | -                     | If `true`, animations are skipped.&#xA;If unset or `false`, the animations respects the user's `prefers-reduced-motion` setting.                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| slotProps                 | `BarChartProSlotProps`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | `{}`                  | The props used for each component slot.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| slots                     | `BarChartProSlots`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | `{}`                  | Overridable component slots.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| sx                        | `SxProps<Theme>`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | -                     | -                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| theme                     | `'light' \| 'dark'`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -                     | -                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| title                     | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | -                     | The title of the chart.&#xA;Used to provide an accessible label for the chart.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| tooltipAxis               | `AxisItemIdentifier[]`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | -                     | The controlled axis tooltip.&#xA;Identified by the axis id, and data index.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| tooltipItem               | `BarItemIdentifier \| LegendItemParams<BarItemIdentifier, 'type'> \| null`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | -                     | The tooltip item.&#xA;Used when the tooltip is controlled.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| width                     | `number`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | -                     | The width of the chart in px. If not defined, it takes the width of the parent element.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| xAxis                     | `(MakeOptional<AxisConfig<'band', any, ChartsXAxisProps>, 'id'> \| MakeOptional<AxisConfig<'point', any, ChartsXAxisProps>, 'id'> \| MakeOptional<AxisConfig<'log', any, ChartsXAxisProps>, 'id'> \| MakeOptional<AxisConfig<'symlog', any, ChartsXAxisProps>, 'id'> \| MakeOptional<AxisConfig<'pow', any, ChartsXAxisProps>, 'id'> \| MakeOptional<AxisConfig<'sqrt', any, ChartsXAxisProps>, 'id'> \| MakeOptional<AxisConfig<'time', any, ChartsXAxisProps>, 'id'> \| MakeOptional<AxisConfig<'utc', any, ChartsXAxisProps>, 'id'> \| MakeOptional<AxisConfig<'linear', any, ChartsXAxisProps>, 'id'>)[]` | -                     | The configuration of the x-axes.&#xA;If not provided, a default axis config is used.&#xA;An array of \[\[AxisConfig]] objects.                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| yAxis                     | `(MakeOptional<AxisConfig<'band', any, ChartsYAxisProps>, 'id'> \| MakeOptional<AxisConfig<'point', any, ChartsYAxisProps>, 'id'> \| MakeOptional<AxisConfig<'log', any, ChartsYAxisProps>, 'id'> \| MakeOptional<AxisConfig<'symlog', any, ChartsYAxisProps>, 'id'> \| MakeOptional<AxisConfig<'pow', any, ChartsYAxisProps>, 'id'> \| MakeOptional<AxisConfig<'sqrt', any, ChartsYAxisProps>, 'id'> \| MakeOptional<AxisConfig<'time', any, ChartsYAxisProps>, 'id'> \| MakeOptional<AxisConfig<'utc', any, ChartsYAxisProps>, 'id'> \| MakeOptional<AxisConfig<'linear', any, ChartsYAxisProps>, 'id'>)[]` | -                     | The configuration of the y-axes.&#xA;If not provided, a default axis config is used.&#xA;An array of \[\[AxisConfig]] objects.                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| zAxis                     | `(MakeOptional<ZAxisConfig, 'id'>)[]`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | -                     | The configuration of the z-axes.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| zoomData                  | `ZoomData[]`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | -                     | The list of zoom data related to each axis.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| zoomInteractionConfig     | `ZoomInteractionConfig`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | -                     | Configuration for zoom interactions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| id                        | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | -                     | This prop is used to help implement the accessibility logic.&#xA;If you don't provide this prop. It falls back to a randomly generated id.                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| children                  | `React.ReactNode`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | -                     | -                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| className                 | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | -                     | -                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |

**`hiddenItems` Prop Example:**

```ts
[
  {
    type: 'pie',
    seriesId: 'series-1',
    dataIndex: 3,
  },
  {
    type: 'line',
    seriesId: 'series-2',
  },
];
```

**`initialHiddenItems` Prop Example:**

```ts
[
  {
    type: 'pie',
    seriesId: 'series-1',
    dataIndex: 3,
  },
  {
    type: 'line',
    seriesId: 'series-2',
  },
];
```

### BarElement

**BarElement Props:**

| Prop            | Type                         | Default | Description                             |
| :-------------- | :--------------------------- | :------ | :-------------------------------------- |
| hidden          | `boolean`                    | -       | -                                       |
| classes         | `Partial<BarClasses>`        | -       | -                                       |
| color\*         | `string`                     | -       | -                                       |
| dataIndex\*     | `number`                     | -       | -                                       |
| height\*        | `number`                     | -       | -                                       |
| layout\*        | `'horizontal' \| 'vertical'` | -       | -                                       |
| seriesId\*      | `string`                     | -       | -                                       |
| skipAnimation\* | `boolean`                    | -       | -                                       |
| slotProps       | `BarElementSlotProps`        | `{}`    | The props used for each component slot. |
| slots           | `BarElementSlots`            | `{}`    | Overridable component slots.            |
| width\*         | `number`                     | -       | -                                       |
| x\*             | `number`                     | -       | -                                       |
| xOrigin\*       | `number`                     | -       | -                                       |
| y\*             | `number`                     | -       | -                                       |
| yOrigin\*       | `number`                     | -       | -                                       |

### BarLabel

**BarLabel Props:**

| Prop            | Type                         | Default    | Description                                                                                                     |
| :-------------- | :--------------------------- | :--------- | :-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| hidden          | `boolean`                    | -          | If true, the bar label is hidden.                                                                               |
| classes         | `Partial<BarClasses>`        | -          | -                                                                                                               |
| color\*         | `string`                     | -          | -                                                                                                               |
| dataIndex\*     | `number`                     | -          | -                                                                                                               |
| height\*        | `number`                     | -          | Height of the bar this label belongs to.                                                                        |
| isFaded\*       | `boolean`                    | -          | -                                                                                                               |
| isHighlighted\* | `boolean`                    | -          | -                                                                                                               |
| layout\*        | `'vertical' \| 'horizontal'` | -          | -                                                                                                               |
| placement       | `'center' \| 'outside'`      | `'center'` | The placement of the bar label.&#xA;It controls whether the label is rendered in the center or outside the bar. |
| seriesId\*      | `string`                     | -          | -                                                                                                               |
| skipAnimation\* | `boolean`                    | -          | -                                                                                                               |
| width\*         | `number`                     | -          | Width of the bar this label belongs to.                                                                         |
| x\*             | `number`                     | -          | Position in the x-axis of the bar this label belongs to.                                                        |
| xOrigin\*       | `number`                     | -          | The x-coordinate of the stack this bar label belongs to.                                                        |
| y\*             | `number`                     | -          | Position in the y-axis of the bar this label belongs to.                                                        |
| yOrigin\*       | `number`                     | -          | The y-coordinate of the stack this bar label belongs to.                                                        |

### BarPlot

Demos:

- [Bars](https://mui.com/x/react-charts/bars/)
- [Bar demonstration](https://mui.com/x/react-charts/bar-demo/)
- [Stacking](https://mui.com/x/react-charts/stacking/)

API:

- [BarPlot API](https://mui.com/x/api/charts/bar-plot/)

**BarPlot Props:**

| Prop          | Type               | Default        | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| :------------ | :----------------- | :------------- | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| borderRadius  | `number`           | -              | Defines the border radius of the bar element.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| onItemClick   | `onItemClick`      | -              | Callback fired when a bar item is clicked.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| renderer      | `RendererType`     | `'svg-single'` | The type of renderer to use for the bar plot. `svg-single`: Renders every bar in a `<rect />` element.`svg-batch`: Batch renders bars in `<path />` elements for better performance with large datasets, at the cost of some limitations.&#xA;Read more: https\://mui.com/x/react-charts/bars/#performance |
| skipAnimation | `boolean`          | `undefined`    | If `true`, animations are skipped.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| slotProps     | `BarPlotSlotProps` | `{}`           | The props used for each component slot.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| slots         | `BarPlotSlots`     | `{}`           | Overridable component slots.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| className     | `string`           | -              | A CSS class name applied to the root element.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |

**ChartsAxisTooltipContent Props:**

| Prop    | Type                            | Default  | Description                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| :------ | :------------------------------ | :------- | :-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| classes | `Partial<ChartsTooltipClasses>` | -        | Override or extend the styles applied to the component.                                                                                                                                       |
| sort    | `'none' \| 'asc' \| 'desc'`     | `'none'` | The sort in which series items are displayed in the tooltip.&#xA;When set to `none`, series are sorted as they are provided in the series property. Otherwise they are sorted by their value. |
| sx      | `SxProps<Theme>`                | -        | -                                                                                                                                                                                             |

### ChartsBrushOverlay

Component that renders visual feedback during brush interaction

**ChartsBrushOverlay Props:**

| Prop      | Type     | Default | Description                                   |
| :-------- | :------- | :------ | :-------------------------------------------- |
| className | `string` | -       | A CSS class name applied to the root element. |

### ChartsClipPath

API:

- [ChartsClipPath API](https://mui.com/x/api/charts/charts-clip-path/)

**ChartsClipPath Props:**

| Prop   | Type                                                               | Default | Description                                                                                                                             |
| :----- | :----------------------------------------------------------------- | :------ | :-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| offset | `{ top?: number; right?: number; bottom?: number; left?: number }` | -       | Offset, in pixels, of the clip path rectangle from the drawing area. A positive value will move the rectangle outside the drawing area. |
| id\*   | `string`                                                           | -       | The id of the clip path.                                                                                                                |

### ChartsContainerPro

It sets up the data providers as well as the `<svg>` for the chart.

This is a combination of both the `ChartsDataProviderPro` and `ChartsSurface` components.

Demos:

- [Composition](https://mui.com/x/api/charts/composition/)

API:

- [ChartsContainerPro API](https://mui.com/x/api/charts/charts-container-pro/)

**ChartsContainerPro Props:**

| Prop                 | Type              | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| :------------------- | :------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | :-------------------- | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |

`rainbowSurgePalette` | Color palette used to colorize multiple series. If not defined, it takes the height of the parent element.                                                                                                                                                                                    |

### ChartsDataProvider

Orchestrates the data providers for the chart components and hooks.

Use this component if you have custom HTML components that need to access the chart data.

Demos:

- [Composition](https://mui.com/x/react-charts/composition/)

API:

- [ChartsDataProvider API](https://mui.com/x/api/charts/charts-data-provider/)

**ChartsDataProvider Props:**

| Prop                 | Type                                                                                                                                                                                          | Default               | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| :------------------- | :-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | :-------------------- | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| apiRef               | `React.RefObject<ChartPublicAPI<ChartAnyPluginSignature[]> \| undefined>`                                                                                                                     | -                     | -                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| colors               | `ChartsColorPalette`                                                                                                                                                                          | `rainbowSurgePalette` | Color palette used to colorize multiple series.                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| dataset              | `DatasetElementType<unknown>[]`                                                                                                                                                               | -                     | An array of objects that can be used to populate series and axes data using their `dataKey` property.                                                                                                                                                                        |
| experimentalFeatures | `LineExperimentalFeatures \| {}`                                                                                                                                                              | -                     | Options to enable features planned for the next major.                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| height               | `number`                                                                                                                                                                                      | -                     | The height of the chart in px. If not defined, it takes the height of the parent element.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| localeText           | `Partial<ChartsLocaleText>`                                                                                                                                                                   | -                     | Localized text for chart components.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| margin               | `Partial<ChartMargin> \| number`                                                                                                                                                              | -                     | The margin between the SVG and the drawing area.&#xA;It's used for leaving some space for extra information such as the x- and y-axis or legend. Accepts a `number` to be used on all sides or an object with the optional properties: `top`, `bottom`, `left`, and `right`. |
| plugins              | `ConvertSignaturesIntoPlugins<ChartAnyPluginSignature[]>`                                                                                                                                     | -                     | Array of plugins used to add features to the chart.                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| series               | `(HeatmapSeriesType \| BarSeriesType \| LineSeriesType \| ScatterSeriesType \| PieSeriesType<MakeOptional<PieValueType, 'id'>> \| RadarSeriesType \| FunnelSeriesType \| SankeySeriesType)[]` | -                     | The array of series to display.&#xA;Each type of series has its own specificity.&#xA;Please refer to the appropriate docs page to learn more about it.                                                                                                                       |
| seriesConfig         | `ChartSeriesConfig<any> & ChartSeriesConfig<'bar' \| 'line' \| 'scatter' \| 'pie' \| 'radar' \| 'heatmap' \| 'funnel' \| 'sankey'>`                                                           | -                     | The configuration for the series types.&#xA;This is used to define how each series type should be processed, colored, and displayed.                                                                                                                                         |
| skipAnimation        | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                                     | -                     | If `true`, animations are skipped.&#xA;If unset or `false`, the animations respects the user's `prefers-reduced-motion` setting.                                                                                                                                             |
| slotProps            | `Partial<ChartsDataProviderSlotProps>`                                                                                                                                                        | -                     | The props for the slots.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| slots                | `Partial<ChartsDataProviderSlots>`                                                                                                                                                            | -                     | Slots to customize charts' components.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| theme                | `'light' \| 'dark'`                                                                                                                                                                           | -                     | -                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| width                | `number`                                                                                                                                                                                      | -                     | The width of the chart in px. If not defined, it takes the width of the parent element.                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| id                   | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                      | -                     | This prop is used to help implement the accessibility logic.&#xA;If you don't provide this prop. It falls back to a randomly generated id.                                                                                                                                   |
| children             | `React.ReactNode`                                                                                                                                                                             | -                     | -                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |

### ChartsGrid

Demos:

- [Axis](https://mui.com/x/react-charts/axis/)

API:

- [ChartsGrid API](https://mui.com/x/api/charts/charts-axis/)

**ChartsGrid Props:**

| Prop       | Type                         | Default | Description                                             |
| :--------- | :--------------------------- | :------ | :------------------------------------------------------ |
| classes    | `Partial<ChartsGridClasses>` | -       | Override or extend the styles applied to the component. |
| horizontal | `boolean`                    | -       | Displays horizontal grid.                               |
| vertical   | `boolean`                    | -       | Displays vertical grid.                                 |
| className  | `string`                     | -       | A CSS class name applied to the root element.           |

### ChartsItemTooltipContent

**ChartsItemTooltipContent Props:**

| Prop    | Type                            | Default | Description                                             |
| :------ | :------------------------------ | :------ | :------------------------------------------------------ |
| classes | `Partial<ChartsTooltipClasses>` | -       | Override or extend the styles applied to the component. |
| sx      | `SxProps<Theme>`                | -       | -                                                       |

### ChartsLegend

**ChartsLegend Props:**

| Prop                    | Type                                                                                                                     | Default | Description                                                                                  |
| :---------------------- | :----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | :------ | :------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| classes                 | `Partial<ChartsLegendClasses>`                                                                                           | -       | Override or extend the styles applied to the component.                                      |
| direction               | `Direction`                                                                                                              | -       | The direction of the legend layout.&#xA;The default depends on the chart.                    |
| onItemClick             | `((event: React.MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement, MouseEvent>, legendItem: SeriesLegendItemContext, index: number) => void)` | -       | Callback fired when a legend item is clicked.                                                |
| slotProps               | `ChartsLegendSlotProps`                                                                                                  | `{}`    | The props used for each component slot.                                                      |
| slots                   | `ChartsLegendSlots`                                                                                                      | `{}`    | Overridable component slots.                                                                 |
| sx                      | `SxProps<Theme>`                                                                                                         | -       | -                                                                                            |
| tabIndex                | `number`                                                                                                                 | -       | -                                                                                            |
| toggleVisibilityOnClick | `boolean`                                                                                                                | `false` | If `true`, clicking on a legend item will toggle the visibility of the corresponding series. |
| className               | `string`                                                                                                                 | -       | -                                                                                            |

| :--- | :--------------- | :------ | :---------- |

### ChartsOverlay

**ChartsOverlay Props:**

| Prop      | Type                     | Default | Description                                |
| :-------- | :----------------------- | :------ | :----------------------------------------- |
| loading   | `boolean`                | `false` | If `true`, a loading overlay is displayed. |

### ChartsReferenceLine

**ChartsReferenceLine Props:**

| Prop       | Type                                   | Default                                                                      | Description                                                                                                                                            |
| :--------- | :------------------------------------- | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------- | :----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| label      | `string`                               | -                                                                            | The label to display along the reference line.                                                                                                         |
| axisId     | `AxisId`                               | ``The `id` of the first defined axis.``                                      | The id of the axis used for the reference value.                                                                                                       |
| classes    | `Partial<ChartsReferenceLineClasses>`  | -                                                                            | Override or extend the styles applied to the component.                                                                                                |
| labelAlign | `'start' \| 'middle' \| 'end'`         | `'middle'`                                                                   | The alignment if the label is in the chart drawing area.                                                                                               |
| labelStyle | `ChartsTextStyle`                      | -                                                                            | The style applied to the label.                                                                                                                        |
| lineStyle  | `React.CSSProperties`                  | -                                                                            | The style applied to the line.                                                                                                                         |
| spacing    | `number \| { x?: number; y?: number }` | `{ x: 0, y: 5 } on a horizontal line and { x: 5, y: 0 } on a vertical line.` | Additional space around the label in px.&#xA;Can be a number or an object `{ x, y }` to distinguish space with the reference line and space with axes. |
| x          | `string \| number \| Date`             | -                                                                            | The x value associated with the reference line.&#xA;If defined the reference line will be vertical.                                                    |
| y          | `string \| number \| Date`             | -                                                                            | The y value associated with the reference line.&#xA;If defined the reference line will be horizontal.                                                  |

### ChartsSurface

A helper component that combines `<ChartsLayerContainer>` and `<ChartsSvgLayer>` to provide a surface for drawing charts.
If you need more control over the layers, you can use `<ChartsLayerContainer>` and `<ChartsSvgLayer>` separately.

Demos:

- [Composition](https://mui.com/x/api/charts/composition/)

API:

- [ChartsSurface API](https://mui.com/x/api/charts/charts-surface/)

**ChartsSurface Props:**

| Prop      | Type              | Default | Description                                                                                |
| :-------- | :---------------- | :------ | :----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| desc      | `string`          | -       | The description of the chart.&#xA;Used to provide an accessible description for the chart. |
| sx        | `SxProps<Theme>`  | -       | -                                                                                          |
| title     | `string`          | -       | The title of the chart.&#xA;Used to provide an accessible label for the chart.             |
| children  | `React.ReactNode` | -       | -                                                                                          |
| className | `string`          | -       | -                                                                                          |

### ChartsText

Helper component to manage multiline text in SVG

**ChartsText Props:**

| Prop             | Type              | Default | Description                            |
| :--------------- | :---------------- | :------ | :------------------------------------- |
| lineHeight       | `number`          | -       | Height of a text line (in `em`).       |
| needsComputation | `boolean`         | `false` | If `true`, the line width is computed. |
| ownerState       | `any`             | -       | -                                      |
| text\*           | `string`          | -       | Text displayed.                        |
| style            | `ChartsTextStyle` | -       | Style applied to text elements.        |

| style     | `React.CSSProperties`                                                                                                                                                                             | -       | -                                                       |

### ChartsTooltip

Demos:

- [ChartsTooltip](https://mui.com/x/react-charts/tooltip/)

API:

- [ChartsTooltip API](https://mui.com/x/api/charts/charts-tool-tip/)

**ChartsTooltip Props:**

| Prop      | Type                                     | Default     | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| :-------- | :--------------------------------------- | :---------- | :------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| classes   | `Partial<ChartsTooltipContainerClasses>` | -           | Override or extend the styles applied to the component.                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| position  | `'top' \| 'bottom' \| 'left' \| 'right'` | -           | Determines the tooltip position relatively to the anchor.                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| slotProps | `ChartsTooltipContainerSlotProps`        | `{}`        | The props used for each component slot.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| slots     | `ChartsTooltipContainerSlots`            | `{}`        | Overridable component slots.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| sort      | `'none' \| 'asc' \| 'desc'`              | `'none'`    | Defines the sort order in which series items are displayed in the axis tooltip.&#xA;When set to `none`, series are displayed in the same order they are provided in the series property. Otherwise they are sorted by their value.&#xA;Only applies when `trigger='axis'`. |
| trigger   | `'axis' \| 'none' \| 'item'`             | `'axis'`    | Select the kind of tooltip to display 'item': Shows data about the item below the mouse;'axis': Shows values associated with the hovered x value;'none': Does not display tooltip.                                                                                         |
| anchor    | `'node' \| 'pointer' \| 'chart'`         | `'pointer'` | Determine if the tooltip should be placed on the pointer location or on the node.                                                                                                                                                                                          |

- [ChartsTooltip](https://mui.com/x/react-charts/tooltip/)

API:

| Prop      | Type                                     | Default     | Description                                                                                                                                                                        |
| :-------- | :--------------------------------------- | :---------- | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
